The '''L-23 blaster pistol''' was a [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. It was produced in such large numbers, and was so widely distributed, that it was commonly available through the black market and underground dealers in rather large numbers. Of course this meant that many of the weapons made their way into the hands of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], despite the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] regulations on [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] weapons.
